creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Tue Mar  4 10:05:13 2014
New Revision: 347003
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347003
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347003/

Log:
  textproc/highlight: fix runtime
  
  - fix runtime by placing port data files into proper locations
  - bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:		187151
  Reported by:	Nunzio Ilari <nunzio.ilari@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/highlight/Makefile
  head/textproc/highlight/pkg-plist

Modified: head/textproc/highlight/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/highlight/Makefile	Tue Mar  4 10:00:05 2014	(r347002)
+++ head/textproc/highlight/Makefile	Tue Mar  4 10:05:13 2014	(r347003)
@@ -3,14 +3,14 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	highlight
 PORTVERSION=	2.16
-PORTEPOCH=	1
+PORTEPOCH=	2
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.andre-simon.de/zip/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Customizable syntax highlighter
 
-USES=	gmake
+USES=		gmake
 MAKEFILE=	makefile
 MAKE_ARGS=	CXX="${CXX}" \
 		CFLAGS="${CXXFLAGS} ${CPPFLAGS} -DHAVE_DECL_GETOPT" \
@@ -32,9 +32,9 @@ do-install:
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/${PORTNAME}.1.gz ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${ETCDIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/filetypes.conf ${STAGEDIR}${ETCDIR}/filetypes.conf.sample
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
 .for d in langDefs themes
-	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/$d
-	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} $d ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/$d
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} $d ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR})
 .endfor
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${PORTDOCS:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}

Modified: head/textproc/highlight/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/highlight/pkg-plist	Tue Mar  4 10:00:05 2014	(r347002)
+++ head/textproc/highlight/pkg-plist	Tue Mar  4 10:05:13 2014	(r347003)

 %%ETCDIR%%/filetypes.conf.sample
 @exec if [ ! -f %D/%%ETCDIR%%/filetypes.conf ] ; then cp -p %D/%F %B/filetypes.conf; fi
